001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo;
002
003import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
004import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
005import java.time.LocalDate;
006import java.util.ArrayList;
007import java.util.List;
008
009public final class NextMilestoneHelper {
010
011  private static final String LABEL_DAY_7 = "Next: Day 7 Candling Observation";
012  private static final String LABEL_DAY_14 = "Next: Day 14 Candling Observation";
013  private static final String LABEL_DAY_18 = "Next: Day 18 Candling / Lockdown";
014  private static final String LABEL_HATCH = "Next: Expected Hatch Day";
015
016  private NextMilestoneHelper() {
017  }
018
019  @NonNull
020  public static NextMilestoneSummary computeNextMilestone(
021      @Nullable LocalDate dateSet,
022      @Nullable LocalDate lockdownDate,
023      @Nullable LocalDate expectedHatchDate,
024      @NonNull LocalDate today
025  ) {
026    LocalDate day7 = (dateSet != null) ? dateSet.plusDays(7) : null;
027    LocalDate day14 = (dateSet != null) ? dateSet.plusDays(14) : null;
028    LocalDate day18 = computeLockdownDate(dateSet, lockdownDate, expectedHatchDate);
029
030    List<NextMilestoneSummary> candidates = new ArrayList<>();
031    candidates.add(new NextMilestoneSummary(LABEL_DAY_7, day7));
032    candidates.add(new NextMilestoneSummary(LABEL_DAY_14, day14));
033    candidates.add(new NextMilestoneSummary(LABEL_DAY_18, day18));
034    candidates.add(new NextMilestoneSummary(LABEL_HATCH, expectedHatchDate));
035
036    NextMilestoneSummary fallback = null;
037
038    for (NextMilestoneSummary candidate : candidates) {
039      LocalDate date = candidate.getDate();
040      if (date == null) {
041        continue;
042      }
043      fallback = candidate;
044      if (!date.isBefore(today)) {
045        return candidate;
046      }
047    }
048
049    return (fallback != null)
050        ? fallback
051        : new NextMilestoneSummary("Next milestone unavailable", null);
052  }
053
054  @Nullable
055  private static LocalDate computeLockdownDate(
056      @Nullable LocalDate dateSet,
057      @Nullable LocalDate lockdownDate,
058      @Nullable LocalDate expectedHatchDate
059  ) {
060    if (lockdownDate != null) {
061      return lockdownDate;
062    }
063    if (expectedHatchDate != null) {
064      return expectedHatchDate.minusDays(3);
065    }
066    return (dateSet != null) ? dateSet.plusDays(18) : null;
067  }
068}
